title: Neomammillaria tegelbergiana
taxonomy: Neomammillaria tegelbergiana is classified as a species within the genus Neomammillaria, which is a part of the Mammillaria subgenus Pseudomammillaria. The genus Neomammillaria is a group of cacti that are closely related to the genus Mammillaria. Neomammillaria tegelbergiana is further classified within the family Cactaceae, which includes all cacti. The species is native to Mexico and is a popular choice among cactus enthusiasts due to its unique appearance and hardy nature. Neomammillaria tegelbergiana is also known by its synonym, Mammillaria tegelbergiana.
